creator: kirk@strauser.com
text:
Thanks for the quick reply. My mistake on 2.7; I looked right past it.

Please don't deprecate 2.11 just yet. It's the last version that's a =
more-or-less trivial upgrade from 2.10- I think.

I added 2.13 on the idea that it would probably be there in the next few =
days.

Major thanks to everyone who's working on the Zope ports. :-)=
